mdRecord.dcterms:title: War Time Correspondence to Capt. C. M. Stigleman at Tudor Hall
mdRecord.dcterms:description: War time correspondence, October 1, 1861, to Capt. C. M. Stigleman at Tudor Hall, Prince William Ct, Va, from Sam Dobyns at Floyd CH, Va. Subject: Health of Capt. Stigleman and news from back home. 1 original piece.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Soldiers
United States
Correspondence
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
